content:
FINAL PRODUCTION QA DEPLOY

Deploy the browser automation service to production.

After deployment, execute these production tests:

1. GET /api/ivx/qa/status
2. POST /api/ivx/qa/run (Owner Chat)
3. Capture landing page screenshot.
4. Capture Members page screenshot.
5. Capture Owner Chat screenshot.
6. Capture Android layout screenshot.
7. Capture iOS layout screenshot.
8. Verify login.
9. Verify AI reply.
10. Verify message persistence.
11. Save all screenshots.
12. Return only production evidence.

FINAL REPORT

GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
QA_STATUS_ENDPOINT:
OWNER_CHAT_RESULT:
MEMBERS_RESULT:
LANDING_RESULT:
ANDROID_RESULT:
IOS_RESULT:
SCREENSHOTS_CAPTURED:
PRODUCTION_URL:
FINAL_STATUS:

If any screenshot cannot be captured from the live production system, mark FINAL_STATUS = FAILED.
Do not report VERIFIED unless the production deployment has been completed and the QA endpoints have been exercised successfully.
